local_validation.notes: Prompt guide passed and wellness reported production aligned with origin/main. The focused multi-source band passed as a 3-kernel only host-I/O proof with verdict 65535 and 1 ok, 0 divergent: it reads a real source file slice, writes and reads a real segmented cell-log-store value, sends a real TCP loopback request through kh-serve-listener, receives the native-kernel HTTP wire response, extracts the body, builds a socket route trace receipt, reads a .fkb channel after cursor 1, consumes a capacity-2 window, and records one deferred event as stream pressure. The real-source band passed with verdict 8191 after citation offsets were updated. The base summary-learning band passed with verdict 262143 and fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables).

ci_validation.notes: CI not run yet in this evidence record.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy performed yet. This is a local Form stdlib and documentation slice.

phase_gate.gate: Cells and recipes can plan and inspect summary source inputs from socket-served kernel routes and backpressure-aware stream windows through the same native source-coordinate receipt shape.
phase_gate.next: Move the route trace from single-process loopback into production front-door telemetry and move stream pressure from read-window defer receipts into producer pacing, ack, and replay receipts.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: No public API behavior changed. Form-native source-coordinate planning now names socket route trace and stream pressure carriers, and the focused proof physically exercises the local socket route and backpressure read window.
test_flows: The multi-source band drives a real local TCP request through the Form kh-serve-listener route server and validates native-kernel wire/body receipts.
The stream lane reads real .fkb channel data and records capacity, total-after-cursor, deferred-count, pressure, status, and decision rows before learning.
The existing summary and real-source bands remain green.
e2e_validation.summary: Local Form proof passed; no public endpoint changed.
